metas.title: OsteoSpot by Annachiara | Professional Osteopathy in Palma de Mallorca
metas.description: OsteoSpot by Annachiara offers professional osteopathy in Palma de Mallorca. Personalized treatments to relieve pain, restore balance and enhance physical and emotional well-being.
metas.keywords: osteospot, annachiara, osteopath palma mallorca, osteopathy mallorca, therapeutic massages, craniosacral therapy, reflexology, wellness treatments

home.welcome: Osteo Spot is my dedicated space for well-being, physical recovery and emotional balance. I provide high-quality, personalized care for people seeking a professional osteopath in Palma de Mallorca.
home.expert_paragraph_1:
I specialize in structural, fascial, visceral and craniosacral osteopathy, always using a fully manual and holistic approach.

My techniques help reduce pain, improve mobility and support the body’s natural balance and healing capacity.

Osteopathic treatment focuses on identifying and correcting tissue dysfunctions that affect natural movement, restoring functionality and promoting recovery.

The body functions as a unified system; when one area is affected, others compensate. Osteopathy works to identify and treat these imbalances to restore overall harmony.
home.expert_paragraph_2: Osteopathic treatment aims to identify and correct dysfunctions that alter the body’s natural mobility, restoring function and supporting recovery.
home.reason: The human body operates as an interconnected system. When one structure becomes dysfunctional, others compensate, creating imbalance. Osteopathy restores harmony by addressing these compensations.
home.history_brief: Osteopathic Medicine originated in 1874 through the work of Dr. A.T. Still, who developed a therapeutic approach based on stimulating the body's natural self-healing mechanisms.

treatments.craneo_sacral:
Craniosacral Therapy

Craniosacral therapy is based on the subtle motion between the skull, vertebrae and sacrum, known as the “primary respiratory movement,” which supports the flow of cerebrospinal fluid throughout the body.

Recommended for:

  • Sleep disorders
  • Headaches
  • Stress
  • TMJ dysfunction
  • Allergies
treatments.reflexology:
Neuromuscular Reflexology

An advanced foot reflexology technique designed to regulate the nervous system and treat soft-tissue injuries.

Recommended for:

  • Inflammation and soft-tissue pain
  • Muscle tension
  • Tendon issues
  • Ligament strain
  • Fascial tension and foot pain

Body Reflexology

A natural therapy that stimulates reflex areas to support the body’s homeostasis.

  • Releases energetic blockages
  • Reduces stress
  • Improves circulation and immune response
  • Activates natural detoxification
  • Acts as an excellent preventive method
treatments.drenaje_linfatico:
Lymphatic Drainage (Legs and Feet)

Stimulates lymphatic flow, reduces fluid retention and supports natural detoxification processes.

Anti-Arthrosis Treatment (Hands and Feet)

Improves joint mobility and reduces stiffness associated with natural wear over time.

Enhances tissue elasticity and comfort.

Body Massages and Reiki
treatments.osteopatia_estructural:
Osteopathy & Fasciotherapy

A deeply relaxing massage focusing on the muscular fascia, complemented by osteopathic adjustments.

Recommended for:

  • Muscle contractures
  • Neck, back and lumbar pain
  • Sciatica and herniated discs
  • Scapulohumeral periarthritis
  • Sprains
  • Meniscus problems
  • Hip pain
  • Mandibular tension and abdominal restrictions
treatments.visceral:
Visceral Massage

An osteopathic technique that releases tension in internal organs, improving their mobility and function.

Indicated for:

  • Digestive discomfort
  • Gastritis and intestinal problems
  • Constipation
  • Hiatal hernia
  • Gynecological issues and incontinence
  • Chronic back pain

Also beneficial for menstrual discomfort and improving muscular tone.

geriatric.indicated_treatments:
Osteopathic treatments are particularly indicated for:

  • Muscle pain
  • Limited joint mobility
  • Sleep disturbances
  • Temporary cognitive decline
  • Non-serious falls
  • ENT issues
  • Recurring headaches
  • General health assessment
  • Life transitions such as retirement
  • Starting new physical activities
geriatric.block_3:
Osteopathy is especially valuable in older adults. Gentle, non-invasive techniques help reduce pain, improve mobility and restore vitality.

Age-related conditions like osteoarthritis are common, but they should not limit quality of life. Osteopathy enhances mobility, flexibility and overall comfort.

It supports circulation, organ function and systemic balance.

Additionally, it is helpful for issues such as hypertension, intestinal problems, urinary incontinence and vascular disorders.
geriatric.intro_text: As we age, various physical challenges can emerge due to past habits, injuries or natural wear. Osteopathy helps address these changes and maintain well-being.

pediatric.intro_text: Specialized treatments for babies, children and adolescents using gentle, safe and non-invasive techniques.
pediatric.craneo_sacral:
Craniosacral Therapy for Children

Pediatric osteopathy uses gentle techniques to release tensions in areas related to the central nervous system, supporting healthy psychomotor development.
pediatric.sutherland_block:
According to Dr. Sutherland, “the bones of the skull and sacrum function as a unit with involuntary motion,” known as the Primary Respiratory Movement. This subtle rhythm is essential for health.

Craniosacral therapy identifies and normalizes restrictions, especially effective in newborns and children due to their structural plasticity.
pediatric.osteopata_block:
The pediatric osteopath identifies tensions and dysfunctions, restoring balance and helping the child's body reach its full potential.

I first learned through my own son, who improved sleep and stress response thanks to craniosacral therapy. I’ve since worked with children experiencing allergies, headaches and breathing issues, with excellent results.

Ideal for newborns after childbirth, and beneficial for school-age children with learning difficulties, bruxism, sleep problems and more.

massages.intro:
The art of physical and emotional well-being
Personalized treatments tailored to your needs.
massages.sports:
Sports Massage

Focused on preventing and recovering from sports injuries.

  • Prepares muscles for exertion
  • Prevents injuries
  • Improves recovery

Energetic Massage

Full-body treatment with mint essential oil and stimulation of energy points.

Facial Treatment

Gentle facial massage for drainage, muscle relaxation and eye-area decongestion.
massages.therapeutic:
Therapeutic Massage

A deep, relaxing full-body massage using fasciotherapy techniques followed by oil work to induce calm.

Can be combined with craniosacral and foot reflexology techniques.

annachiara.mis_habilidades:

  • Specialist in pediatric and visceral osteopathy.
  • Advanced reflexology training.
  • Myofascial therapy and acupressure training.
  • Expert in anti-aging and rejuvenation treatments.

Languages

annachiara.filosofia:
Philosophy

I discovered the beauty and complexity of the human body through personal experience. Osteopathy allows me to help others improve their well-being and live with awareness.

I integrate Yoga to support long-term muscular health and amplify treatment benefits.
